title: Cinematic Vanilla
description: Cinematic Vanilla is a lightweight cinematic shader pack designed to enhance Minecraft visuals while maintaining smooth performance on low- to mid-end PCs.
body:
**CinematicVanilla is a lightweight cinematic shader pack designed to enhance Minecraft visuals while maintaining smooth performance on low to mid-end PCs.**

 

This version brings improved lighting, better water effects, enhanced shadows, and customizable settings for a more immersive gameplay experience without heavy FPS drops.


✨ Features:

- Dynamic lighting with improved day & night colors

- Enhanced water with reflections and smooth waves

- Softer shadows and cinematic fog

- Wind animations for grass and leaves

- Bloom and depth of field effects

- Realistic rain and wet surface visuals

- Multiple performance modes (LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH)

- Fully customizable shader settings

 

⚡ Performance Friendly:

Optimized for systems with 4GB–8GB RAM and older GPUs.

 
🎮 Compatibility:

- OptiFine

- Iris + Sodium

 This shader is perfect for players who want a cinematic look without sacrificing performance.
